query: SELECT a.id as automationId, a.instanceId as automationInstanceId, wi.id as instanceDbId, wi.name as instanceName, mg.id as sourceGroupId, mg.groupName, mg.instanceId as groupInstanceId FROM automations a LEFT JOIN whatsapp_instances wi ON wi.id = a.instanceId LEFT JOIN monitored_groups mg ON mg.id = a.sourceGroupId WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND a.userId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35L7q6jEd6akg49.root --database cTskjyF8t4ZYZoNMwpD42P --execute SELECT a.id as automationId, a.instanceId as automationInstanceId, wi.id as instanceDbId, wi.name as instanceName, mg.id as sourceGroupId, mg.groupName, mg.instanceId as groupInstanceId FROM automations a LEFT JOIN whatsapp_instances wi ON wi.id = a.instanceId LEFT JOIN monitored_groups mg ON mg.id = a.sourceGroupId WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND a.userId = 1;
